Good evening, and welcome to the Riverside Grill here in Lisbon. Let me tell you about tonight before you order. To start, our most popular appetizer is the grilled shrimp, and it is not spicy at all. For the main course, the chef recommends the roasted lamb, which comes with a side dish of potatoes and vegetables. If you have any allergy, please tell your server, and we will adjust the dish for you. We also have a light vegetarian option for guests who prefer it. For dessert, the chocolate cake is excellent, and many guests order a second one. Every main course includes one free beverage, and we offer a free refill of water or juice. When you finish, just ask for the bill, and a small tip is always welcome but never required. Enjoy your evening, and please call your server when you are ready to order.

When I go to a restaurant, I like to order calmly and politely. First, I look at the menu and choose an appetizer to share. I usually ask the server what they recommend, because the local dishes are often the best. For my main course, I prefer something that is not too spicy, with a simple side dish. I always mention that I have an allergy to nuts, so the kitchen can be careful. I drink water, and I am happy when the restaurant offers a free refill. I rarely order dessert, but a coffee is perfect at the end. When I finish, I ask for the bill, and I always leave a tip for good service. For me, a calm dinner with good food is the best part of any trip.

Here is how I order at a restaurant. First, I read the menu and choose my dishes. Then I ask the server what they recommend. After that, I order an appetizer and a main course. Next, I mention my allergy so the kitchen is careful. Finally, when I finish my dessert, I ask for the bill and leave a tip.
